revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Container category}} {{Portal|Biography|{{#ifexist: Portal:{{{Country}}}|{{{Country}}}}}|{{#ifexist: Portal:{{{ParentCountry|}}}|{{{ParentCountry|}}}}}}} {{Category see also|{{{Nationality|}}} women}} {| class="toccolours" style="margin:1em auto;" | style="text-align:center;" | '''[[Wikipedia:Classification|Classification]]:''' [[:Category:People|People]]: [[:Category:People by nationality|By nationality]]: {{#if: {{{ParentNationality|}}} | [[:Category:{{{ParentNationality}}} people{{!}}{{{ParentNationality}}}]]:}} [[:Category:{{{Nationality}}} people|{{{Nationality}}}]]: '''Men'''
''also:'' [[:Category:Countries|Countries]]: {{#if: {{{ParentCountry|}}} | [[:Category:{{{ParentCountry}}}{{!}}{{{ParentCountry}}}]]:}} [[:Category:{{{Country}}}|{{{Country}}}]]: [[:Category:{{{Nationality}}} people|People]]: '''Men'''
''also:'' [[:Category:People|People]]: [[:Category:People by gender|By gender]]: [[:Category:Men|Men]]: [[:Category:Men by nationality|By nationality]]: {{#if: {{{ParentNationality|}}} | [[:Category:{{{ParentNationality}}} men {{!}}{{{ParentNationality}}}]]:}} '''{{{Nationality}}}''' |} {{Hatnote|This [[Help:Categories|category]] exists only as a container for other categories of '''{{{Nationality}}} men'''. Articles on individual men should '''not''' be added directly to this category, but ''may'' be added to an appropriate sub-category if it exists.
Please note that categorisation by gender is acceptable in Wikipedia only in limited circumstances which are set out in [[Wikipedia:Categorization/Gender, race and sexuality]]. New categories by gender may be deleted if they do not meet the tests set out in that guideline.}} [[Category:{{{Nationality}}} people|+Men]] [[Category:Men by nationality|{{{Nationality}}}]] {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Container category}} {{Portal|Biography|{{#ifexist: Portal:{{{Country}}}|{{{Country}}}}}|{{#ifexist: Portal:{{{ParentCountry|}}}|{{{ParentCountry|}}}}}}} {{Category see also|{{{Nationality|}}} women}} {| class="toccolours" style="margin:1em auto;" | style="text-align:center;" | '''[[Wikipedia:Classification|Classification]]:''' [[:Category:People|People]]: [[:Category:People by nationality|By nationality]]: {{#if: {{{ParentNationality|}}} | [[:Category:{{{ParentNationality}}} people{{!}}{{{ParentNationality}}}]]:}} [[:Category:{{{Nationality}}} people|{{{Nationality}}}]]: '''Men'''
''also:'' [[:Category:Countries|Countries]]: {{#if: {{{ParentCountry|}}} | [[:Category:{{{ParentCountry}}}{{!}}{{{ParentCountry}}}]]:}} [[:Category:{{{Country}}}|{{{Country}}}]]: [[:Category:{{{Nationality}}} people|People]]: '''Men'''
''also:'' [[:Category:People|People]]: [[:Category:People by gender|By gender]]: [[:Category:Men|Men]]: [[:Category:Men by nationality|By nationality]]: {{#if: {{{ParentNationality|}}} | [[:Category:{{{ParentNationality}}} men {{!}}{{{ParentNationality}}}]]:}} '''{{{Nationality}}}''' |} {{Hatnote|This [[Help:Categories|category]] exists only as a container for other categories of '''{{{Nationality}}} men'''. Articles on individual men should '''not''' be added directly to this category, but ''may'' be added to an appropriate sub-category if it exists.
Please note that categorisation by gender is acceptable in Wikipedia only in limited circumstances which are set out in [[Wikipedia:Categorization/Gender, race and sexuality]]. New categories by gender may be deleted if they do not meet the tests set out in that guideline.}} [[Category:{{{Nationality}}} people|+Men]] [[Category:Men by nationality|{{{Nationality}}}]] {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:

Please note that categorisation by gender is acceptable in Wikipedia only in limited circumstances which are set out in [[Wikipedia:Categorization/Gender, race and sexuality]]. New categories by gender may be deleted if they do not meet the tests set out in that guideline.}} [[Category:{{{Nationality}}} people|+Men]] [[Category:Men by nationality|{{{Nationality}}}]] {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Container category}} {{Portal|Biography|{{#ifexist: Portal:{{{Country}}}|{{{Country}}}}}|{{#ifexist: Portal:{{{ParentCountry|}}}|{{{ParentCountry|}}}}}}} {{Category see also|{{{Nationality|}}} women}} {| class="toccolours" style="margin:1em auto;" | style="text-align:center;" | '''[[Wikipedia:Classification|Classification]]:''' [[:Category:People|People]]: [[:Category:People by nationality|By nationality]]: {{#if: {{{ParentNationality|}}} | [[:Category:{{{ParentNationality}}} people{{!}}{{{ParentNationality}}}]]:}} [[:Category:{{{Nationality}}} people|{{{Nationality}}}]]: '''Men'''

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fooian_men here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Container category}} {{Portal|Biography|{{#ifexist: Portal:{{{Country}}}|{{{Country}}}}}|{{#ifexist: Portal:{{{ParentCountry|}}}|{{{ParentCountry|}}}}}}} {{Category see also|{{{Nationality|}}} women}} {| class="toccolours" style="margin:1em auto;" | style="text-align:center;" | '''[[Wikipedia:Classification|Classification]]:''' [[:Category:People|People]]: [[:Category:People by nationality|By nationality]]: {{#if: {{{ParentNationality|}}} | [[:Category:{{{ParentNationality}}} people{{!}}{{{ParentNationality}}}]]:}} [[:Category:{{{Nationality}}} people|{{{Nationality}}}]]: '''Men'''

Please note that categorisation by gender is acceptable in Wikipedia only in limited circumstances which are set out in [[Wikipedia:Categorization/Gender, race and sexuality]]. New categories by gender may be deleted if they do not meet the tests set out in that guideline.}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:{{{Nationality}}} people|+Men]] [[Category:Men by nationality|{{{Nationality}}}]] [[Category:{{{ParentNationality}}} men{{!}} {{{Nationality}}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
